Chapter 1 Quiz

The Old Playbook Is Dead — Test Your Understanding

0/10 Questions Answered
1. What is the "Visibility Gap" in the context of agentic marketing?
2. How does GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) differ from traditional SEO?
3. In the Pragmatic 37 framework, which cluster includes activities like market sizing and sales tools production?
4. What does the "10x thesis" in this curriculum actually mean?
5. Why can't AI agents access most traditional B2B marketing content?
6. What happened to Sarah's sales cycle in the story that opens Chapter 1?
7. In the "Three Eras of Enterprise Data," what characterizes Era Three (Data Fabric)?
8. Which of these is an example of a Cluster Three (Elevated) activity?
9. What is the recommended "GEO Audit" exercise from Chapter 1?
10. According to the CMO Perspective, what is wrong with how most marketing departments talk about AI?
